data.title: OpsGuru joins AWS Managed Services Provider Program for operational excellence, driving cloud operations and AI innovation.
data.description: OpsGuru, based in Toronto, disclosed today that it has achieved the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Managed Services Provider Program certification, placing it among a limited number of partners acknowledged for their operational proficiency. This designation acknowledges OpsGuru for its demonstrated track record in effectively managing AWS services. The achievement marks a significant milestone for OpsGuru in solidifying its position as a leading AWS managed services provider.

data.title: PK Consumer Health acquires HealthAid Limited and HealthAid America Inc., a UK VMS player. (Characters: 84)
data.description: On March 4, 2026, PK Consumer Health ("PK"), a company backed by Avista Healthcare Partners and Damier Group, revealed its acquisition of HealthAid Limited and HealthAid America Inc. The deal involves the procurement of both entities, which are prominent providers in the healthcare industry.

data.title: GridPoint nearing $1.5B in customer energy savings with their energy management platform in 20,000+ commercial buildings.
data.description: Businesses are increasingly turning to cost-cutting measures as utility bills continue to increase. GridPoint, a top energy management company with its energy intelligence platform implemented in over 20,000 commercial buildings nationwide, is on the brink of reaching $1.5 million in savings for its clients.

data.title: Minerva Neurosciences (NERV) to attend The Citizens Life Sciences Conference in Miami on March 10-11, 2026.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Burlington, Massachusetts, Minerva Neurosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: NERV), a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage concentrating on therapies for central nervous system conditions, shared the news that Remy Luthringer, PhD, the Executive Chairman & CEO, would be involved in The Citizens Life Sciences Conference held in Miami, FL on March 10-11, 2026.

data.title: Glenmark Specialty SA gets FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol, 44 mcg/actuation, with 180-day exclusivity.
data.description: In Elmwood Park, New Jersey, on March 4, 2026, Glenmark Specialty SA secured approval from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration for Fluticasone Propionate Inhalation Aerosol USP, containing 44 mcg per actuation. Glenmark's inhalation product, Fluticasone Propionate, received final clearance from the FDA.

data.title: Keeper Security launches Jira integrations for unified incident response and access governance, enforcing centralized control.
data.description: In a recent development, new integrations on Jira have been established to streamline security alerts, access requests, and approvals into a unified, controlled workflow. This enhancement allows for enforcement to remain centralized within Keeper Security. The initiative aims to boost efficiency and security measures within the system. The updates took effect in Chicago on March 4, 2026. Keeper Security is renowned for its zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security, catering to privileged access management.
